_instructions._readme: Two types of fields exist in this file. Fill CLIENT DATA fields before handing off to the agent. Leave AI COPY fields as-is - the agent will write them based on your client data.
_instructions._client_data: Fill these manually before starting the project
_instructions._ai_copy: Leave these as [PLACEHOLDER] - the agent writes them
_instructions.phrases: Each phrase: min 6 words, max 8 words
_instructions.content_paragraphs: Each paragraph: min 50 words, max 60 words
_instructions.service_description: Each service description: min 30 words, max 40 words
_instructions.mission_vision_why: These fields must be exactly 50 words each

__CLIENT_DATA__: --- Fill these fields before handing off to the agent ---
company_cover_area: Chesapeake, Suffolk, Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Newport news, Hampton

company_colors._note: Provide hex values or describe the brand colors in words - agent will pick them

services.name: Concrete
services.description: Professional concrete services for driveways, foundations, slabs, and structural work. We deliver durable, long-lasting results using quality materials and proven techniques. From new installations to repairs, our team ensures every project meets your specifications and withstands the test of time.

services.name: Paver
services.description: Transform your outdoor spaces with expert paver installation. We work with concrete pavers, natural stone, and brick to create beautiful patios, walkways, and driveways. Our installations combine aesthetic appeal with durability, giving you surfaces that enhance your property's value and require minimal maintenance.

services.name: Curbing
services.description: Define and protect your landscape with professional curbing services. We install decorative and functional borders that prevent erosion, add visual appeal, and create clean separations between lawns, gardens, and other areas. Our curbing solutions enhance both the appearance and usability of your outdoor spaces.

services.name: Masonry
services.description: Comprehensive masonry services including brick, stone, and concrete work. From structural walls to decorative features, our skilled masons bring expertise to every project. We handle new construction, repairs, and restorations with attention to detail and quality craftsmanship that lasts.

services.name: Hardscape
services.description: Complete hardscape design and installation services to transform your outdoor living areas. We create functional, beautiful spaces using patios, walkways, retaining walls, fire pits, and outdoor kitchens. Our designs blend practicality with aesthetics, tailoring each project to your lifestyle and property needs.

services.name: Stamped Concrete
services.description: Add visual interest to your surfaces with stamped concrete patterns and textures. We offer decorative finishes that mimic brick, stone, slate, and wood while maintaining concrete's durability. Perfect for driveways, patios, and walkways, stamped concrete provides an elegant look at an affordable price.

services.name: House Foundations
services.description: Expert foundation installation and repair services for residential and commercial properties. We provide solid, stable bases using proven construction methods and quality materials. Our team ensures your foundation supports your structure safely and meets all local building requirements for long-term stability.

services.name: Driveway
services.description: Professional driveway installation and resurfacing services using concrete, asphalt, and decorative finishes. We create durable, attractive surfaces that improve access to your property and enhance curb appeal. Our driveways are built to withstand heavy loads and Virginia's weather conditions.

services.name: Patios
services.description: Expand your living space outdoors with custom patio design and installation. We build patios using concrete, pavers, natural stone, and other materials to create comfortable areas for relaxation and entertainment. Our designs complement your landscape while providing durable surfaces that last for years.

services.name: Walkways
services.description: Create safe, attractive pathways throughout your property with professional walkway installation. We use various materials and styles to design walkways that guide visitors through your landscape while adding visual appeal. Our walkways provide durable, slip-resistant surfaces for everyday use.

services.name: Brick
services.description: Expert brick installation and repair services for walls, fireplaces, mailboxes, and decorative accents. Brick offers timeless durability and aesthetic appeal for both structural and ornamental purposes. Our masons ensure quality craftsmanship whether working on new construction or restoring existing brickwork.

services.name: Blocks
services.description: Professional concrete block installation for retaining walls, foundation walls, and structural support. Concrete block construction provides exceptional strength and longevity for various applications. We handle projects from small garden walls to large structural installations with expertise and attention to detail.

services.name: Stair Works
services.description: Safe, code-compliant stair construction and repair for interior and exterior applications. We build concrete, brick, and stone stairs, as well as accessibility ramps, ensuring every installation meets proper standards. Our stair work combines safety, functionality, and visual appeal for lasting value.

__AI_COPY__: --- Leave these as [PLACEHOLDER] - the agent writes them based on client data above ---
phrases: Quality Masonry That Stands The Test of Time
Craftsmanship You Can Trust, Results That Last
Transforming Hampton Roads One Project At A Time
Durable Solutions for Your Home and Business
home_content: WG Masonry & Hardscape 757 has served the Hampton Roads community for 13 years, delivering exceptional masonry and hardscape solutions to homeowners across Portsmouth, Chesapeake, Suffolk, Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Newport News, and Hampton. Our commitment to quality craftsmanship and reliable service has built lasting relationships with clients throughout the region.

We specialize in a comprehensive range of services including concrete installations, paver patios, custom masonry, complete hardscape design, house foundations, driveways, walkways, and more. Whether you're looking to enhance your backyard retreat or need a durable foundation for your property, our skilled team delivers lasting results that combine functionality with aesthetic appeal.

Ready to start your next project? We offer free estimates and flexible scheduling to fit your needs. Our team is available Monday through Sunday from 7AM to 10PM, serving all of Hampton Roads with professional expertise and personalized attention. Contact us today for a consultation and discover why homeowners trust our team for all their masonry and hardscape needs.
about_content: Founded with a passion for quality workmanship, WG Masonry & Hardscape 757 has grown from humble beginnings into a trusted name across Hampton Roads. For 13 years, our family-owned business has been guided by values of integrity, dedication, and customer satisfaction. We treat every project as if it were our own home, ensuring exceptional results that stand the test of time.

Our team takes pride in meticulous attention to detail and superior craftsmanship in every project we undertake. We understand that your home is more than just a building, it is where memories are made and families grow. That is why we use premium materials and proven techniques to ensure durability and beauty in all our work, from simple repairs to complex installations.

We believe in giving back to the communities that have supported us throughout our journey. By serving homeowners across Portsmouth, Chesapeake, Suffolk, Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Newport News, and Hampton, we aim to enhance the beauty and value of properties throughout the region while building lasting relationships one project at a time.
company_mission: Our mission is to deliver superior masonry and hardscape services that enhance the value, functionality, and beauty of properties throughout Hampton Roads. Through skilled craftsmanship, honest communication, and unwavering dedication to customer satisfaction, we build lasting relationships with homeowners and businesses who trust us to bring their visions to life.
company_vision: Our vision is to be the most trusted masonry and hardscape contractor in Hampton Roads, known for exceptional quality and reliability. We aim to expand our services while maintaining the personalized attention that has defined our company for over a decade, continuously innovating to meet evolving homeowner needs.
company_why_choose_us: With 13 years of hands-on experience, we bring unparalleled expertise to every project. We offer free estimates and flexible scheduling, available seven days a week from 7AM to 10PM. Our deep roots in Hampton Roads mean we understand local climates, soil conditions, and architectural styles. Choose us for quality that endures.
